title: Inventory breastfeeding practice and support data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory separating DHS feeding-practice data, BFHI facility data, maternity-policy data, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, methodology, grain, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Map sub-national early initiation and exclusive breastfeeding rates
outcome: A sub-national map of early breastfeeding initiation and exclusive-breastfeeding rates with confidence intervals and survey-year documentation.
validation_method: Replicator reruns estimation with alternative survey subsets and confirms rates within reported confidence intervals.
done_condition: Practice maps include confidence intervals, survey-year documentation, and replication.

title: Map BFHI certification and breastfeeding-support coverage gaps
outcome: A coverage-gap map comparing breastfeeding rates to BFHI-certification and maternity-leave policy coverage.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with support-coverage gap map.
validation_method: Replicator confirms gap methodology and validates BFHI data against independent sources.
done_condition: Gap map includes BFHI-data currency caveats, maternity-policy context, and replication.

title: Red-team misuse of breastfeeding support data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying stigmatization of non-breastfeeding mothers, penalization of non-certified facilities, and undermining of community breastfeeding norms.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every high-risk failure mode has a mitigation or blocks publication, then a second reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every claim qualified or gated behind replication with explicit non-stigmatization safeguards.

title: Check whether outputs match nutrition and maternity program decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether support-coverage maps would change actual facility-certification or community-support decisions responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies the actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk for the output, then a second reviewer replicates the non-use-case check.
done_condition: Output has a named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review.
